name: 百分比应用
subject: math
domain_name: 比率与比例 / Ratios & Proportions / Ratios & Proportions
curriculum_points: 6.RP.3.c Find a percent of a quantity as a rate per 100 (e.g., 30% of a quantity means 30/100 times the quantity); solve problems involving finding the whole, given a part and the percent.

interactive_resources.description: GeoGebra 数学可视化：参数调节探索函数图像

errors.description: 只记年代与名词，不能用史料与制度变迁解释历史进程。
把传说叙述与考古/文献证据混为一谈，未区分证据强度。

exercises.stem: 结合课标要求，说明「百分比应用」的核心内涵，并各举一条史料或史实依据。
exercises.answer: 应答扣课标要点：6.RP.3.c Find a percent of a quantity as a rate per 100 (e.g., 30% of a quantity means 30/100 times the quantity); solve…；并区分证据类型（文献/考古/制度等）。
